# CWE-331 vulnerable: Insufficient Entropy (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-331-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"math/rand"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
	"time"
)

func IssueEmailResetCode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	rng := rand.New(rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano()))
	code := strconv.Itoa(rng.Intn(900000) + 100000)
	email := r.FormValue("email")
	_, err := db.Exec("INSERT INTO reset_codes (email, code) VALUES (?, ?)", email, code)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return nil
}
